name: IdsEdwMbrRateDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH MBR_RATE_in AS (SELECT MBR_RATE.MBR_RATE_SK, MBR_RATE.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, MBR_RATE.EFF_DT_SK, MBR_RATE.SRC_SYS_CD_SK, MBR_RATE.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, MBR_RATE.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, MBR_RATE.MBR_SK, MBR_RATE.SMOKER_IN, MBR_RATE.TERM_DT_SK, COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') SRC_SYS_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MBR_RATE MBR_RATE LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON MBR_RATE.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE MBR_RATE.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle}), main_data AS (SELECT MBR_RATE_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, EFF_DT_SK AS MBR_RATE_EFF_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, MBR_SK, SMOKER_IN, TERM_DT_SK AS MBR_RATE_TERM_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM MBR_RATE_in WHERE MBR_RATE_SK NOT IN (0,1)), unk_data AS (SELECT 0 MBR_RATE_SK, 'UNK' SRC_SYS_CD, 0 MBR_UNIQ_KEY, '1753-01-01' MBR_RATE_EFF_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 0 MBR_SK, 'N' SMOKER_IN, '2199-12-31' MBR_RATE_TERM_DT_SK, 100 CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK), na_data AS (SELECT 1 MBR_RATE_SK, 'NA' SRC_SYS_CD, 1 MBR_UNIQ_KEY, '1753-01-01' MBR_RATE_EFF_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 1 MBR_SK, 'N' SMOKER_IN, '2199-12-31' MBR_RATE_TERM_DT_SK, 100 CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK) SELECT * FROM main_data UNION ALL SELECT * FROM unk_data UNION ALL SELECT * FROM na_data

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2014 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


JOB NAME:     IdsMbrRateDExtr

Called By:  EdwMbrNoDriverSeq

DESCRIPTION:  Extracts from IDS MBR_RATE to flatfile MBR_RATE_D.dat.  Only records with the most recent LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK are pulled.
      

INPUTS:
The following IDS table is used:
MBR_RATE

OUTPUTS: 
                    Flatfile: MBR_RATE_D.dat

MODIFICATIONS:
              
MODIFICATIONS:
Date                 Developer                Change Description                                                                                 Development Environment               Code Reviewer                 Review Date
------------------      ----------------------------     --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------      ----------------------------------------------         -----------------------------------       --------------------
2014-02-14     Santosh Bokka         Original Programming                                                                                 EnterpriseNewDevl                      Bhoomi Dasari                    3/27/2014

Annotations:
Add CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK and LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK
Job name:
IdsEdwMbrRateDExtr
Member Rate Extract - Pulls from IDS MBR_RATE to load to file MBR_RATE_D.dat
Write MBR_RATE_D Data into a Sequential file for Load Ready Job.
Extract updated MBR_RATE IDS Data
